title: croton terminalis
intro: Croton terminalis, also known as the codia or croton, is a plant species within the family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The medicinal properties of Croton terminalis include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin infections, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Croton terminalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
